tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij tabelke, dobierajac okreslenia (A-L) odpowiadajace danej kategorii. Trzy okreslenia podano dodatkowo i nie pasuja one do zadnej kategorii.

options.text: The championship game is called the Super Bowl
Players score by hitting a ball and running around bases
The NBA is the top professional league
A pitcher throws the ball to a batter
Players wear helmets and heavy padding
The game is played on a court with two hoops
A touchdown is worth six points
The World Series is its championship event
Players score goals using a stick and a puck
Slam dunk is one of the most exciting moves
Each match consists of three periods of twenty minutes
Players ride horses and use mallets to hit a ball
